1.2 ж ёеҝғз»„д»¶

ConnectorManager (иҝһжҺҘеҷЁз®ЎзҗҶеҷЁ)

  • иҒҢиҙЈ: иҮӘеҠЁеҸ‘зҺ°е№¶жіЁеҶҢжүҖжңүиҝһжҺҘеҷЁйҖӮй…ҚеҷЁ
  • и·Ҝеҫ„: lmcache/v1/storage_backend/connector/__init__.py
  • жңәеҲ¶: жү«жҸҸ *_adapter.py жЁЎеқ—пјҢиҮӘеҠЁе®һдҫӢеҢ– ConnectorAdapter еӯҗзұ»

ConnectorAdapter (йҖӮй…ҚеҷЁеҹәзұ»)

  • иҒҢиҙЈ: е®ҡд№үиҝһжҺҘеҷЁеҲӣе»әжҺҘеҸЈ
  • ж–№жі•:
  • can_parse(url): еҲӨж–ӯжҳҜеҗҰиғҪи§Јжһҗз»ҷе®ҡ URL
  • create_connector(context): еҲӣе»әе…·дҪ“иҝһжҺҘеҷЁе®һдҫӢ

RemoteConnector (иҝһжҺҘеҷЁжҺҘеҸЈ)

  • иҒҢиҙЈ: е®ҡд№үз»ҹдёҖзҡ„иҝңзЁӢеӯҳеӮЁж“ҚдҪңжҺҘеҸЈ
  • ж ёеҝғж–№жі•: exists, get, put, batched_get, batched_put

2. иҝһжҺҘеҷЁе·ҘеҺӮжЁЎејҸ

2.1 иҮӘеҠЁеҸ‘зҺ°жңәеҲ¶

ConnectorManager йҖҡиҝҮ Python зҡ„ pkgutil иҮӘеҠЁеҸ‘зҺ°жүҖжңүиҝһжҺҘеҷЁйҖӮй…ҚеҷЁпјҡ

# lmcache/v1/storage_backend/connector/__init__.py

class ConnectorManager:
    def _discover_adapters(self) -> None:
        """иҮӘеҠЁеҸ‘зҺ°жүҖжңү *_adapter.py жЁЎеқ—дёӯзҡ„ ConnectorAdapter еӯҗзұ»"""
        import lmcache.v1.storage_backend.connector as connector_pkg

        for _, module_name, _ in pkgutil.iter_modules(connector_pkg.__path__):
            # еҸӘеҠ иҪҪд»Ҙ _adapter з»“е°ҫзҡ„жЁЎеқ—
            if module_name.startswith("_") or not module_name.endswith("_adapter"):
                continue

            module = importlib.import_module(
                f"{connector_pkg.__name__}.{module_name}"
            )

            # жҹҘжүҫжүҖжңү ConnectorAdapter еӯҗзұ»
            for _, obj in inspect.getmembers(module):
                if (inspect.isclass(obj) and 
                    issubclass(obj, ConnectorAdapter) and 
                    obj != ConnectorAdapter):
                    adapter_instance = obj()
                    self.adapters.append(adapter_instance)

2.2 иҝһжҺҘеҷЁеҲӣе»әжөҒзЁӢ

def CreateConnector(url, loop, local_cpu_backend, config, metadata):
    """
    еҲӣе»әиҝһжҺҘеҷЁзҡ„е®Ңж•ҙжөҒзЁӢпјҡ
    1. еҲӣе»ә ConnectorManager
    2. йҒҚеҺҶе·ІжіЁеҶҢзҡ„йҖӮй…ҚеҷЁ
    3. жүҫеҲ°иғҪи§Јжһҗ URL зҡ„йҖӮй…ҚеҷЁ
    4. еҲӣе»әиҝһжҺҘеҷЁе®һдҫӢ
    5. еҢ…иЈ…дёә InstrumentedRemoteConnector (иҮӘеҠЁж·»еҠ зӣ‘жҺ§)
    """
    manager = ConnectorManager(url, loop, local_cpu_backend, config, metadata)
    connector = manager.create_connector()
    return InstrumentedRemoteConnector(connector)

2.3 URL жЁЎејҸеҢ№й…Қ

3. Redis/Valkey еҜ№жҺҘ

3.1 Redis жһ¶жһ„и®ҫи®Ў

3.1.1 иҝһжҺҘжұ з®ЎзҗҶ

# lmcache/v1/storage_backend/connector/redis_connector.py

class RedisConnector(RemoteConnector):
    def __init__(self, url, loop, local_cpu_backend):
        # иҝһжҺҘжұ й…ҚзҪ®
        self.max_connections = 150
        self.sem = asyncio.Semaphore(self.max_connections)

        # еҲӣе»әиҝһжҺҘжұ 
        self.pool = redis.ConnectionPool.from_url(
            url, max_connections=self.max_connections
        )
        self.connection = redis.Redis.from_pool(self.pool)

        # дјҳе…ҲйҳҹеҲ—жү§иЎҢеҷЁ
        self.pq_executor = AsyncPQExecutor(loop)

е…ій”®и®ҫи®Ў:

  • дҝЎеҸ·йҮҸдҝқжҠӨ: йҳІжӯўиҝһжҺҘж•°и¶…йҷҗеҜјиҮҙ Redis еҙ©жәғ
  • ејӮжӯҘиҝһжҺҘжұ : еӨҚз”Ё TCP иҝһжҺҘпјҢжҸҗй«ҳжҖ§иғҪ
  • дјҳе…ҲйҳҹеҲ—: еҢәеҲҶдёҚеҗҢж“ҚдҪңзҡ„дјҳе…Ҳзә§

3.1.2 ж•°жҚ®еӯҳеӮЁж јејҸ

Redis йҮҮз”ЁеҸҢй”®еӯҳеӮЁжЁЎејҸпјҡ

Key 1: <cache_key> + "metadata"
  Value: RemoteMetadata (28 bytes)
    - length: int (ж•°жҚ®й•ҝеәҰ)
    - shape: torch.Size (еј йҮҸеҪўзҠ¶)
    - dtype: torch.dtype (ж•°жҚ®зұ»еһӢ)
    - fmt: MemoryFormat (еҶ…еӯҳж јејҸ)

Key 2: <cache_key> + "kv_bytes"
  Value: bytes (е®һйҷ… KV cache ж•°жҚ®)

дјҳеҠҝ:

  • зӢ¬з«Ӣе…ғж•°жҚ®е’Ңж•°жҚ®пјҢж”ҜжҢҒеҝ«йҖҹжЈҖжҹҘеӯҳеңЁжҖ§
  • йҒҝе…ҚеӨ§еҜ№иұЎдј иҫ“ж—¶зҡ„еәҸеҲ—еҢ–ејҖй”Җ

3.1.3 дјҳе…ҲйҳҹеҲ—жңәеҲ¶

from enum import IntEnum, auto

class Priorities(IntEnum):
    PEEK = auto()      # дјҳе…Ҳзә§ 1: exists() жЈҖжҹҘ
    PREFETCH = auto()  # дјҳе…Ҳзә§ 2: йў„еҸ–ж“ҚдҪң
    GET = auto()       # дјҳе…Ҳзә§ 3: иҺ·еҸ–ж“ҚдҪң
    PUT = auto()       # дјҳе…Ҳзә§ 4: еҶҷе…Ҙж“ҚдҪң (жңҖдҪҺдјҳе…Ҳзә§)

е®һзҺ°:

async def exists(self, key: CacheEngineKey) -> bool:
    return await self.pq_executor.submit_job(
        self._exists, key=key, priority=Priorities.PEEK
    )

async def get(self, key: CacheEngineKey) -> Optional[MemoryObj]:
    return await self.pq_executor.submit_job(
        self._get, key=key, priority=Priorities.GET
    )

3.1.4 жү№йҮҸж“ҚдҪңдјҳеҢ–

async def batched_put(self, keys, memory_objs):
    """жү№йҮҸеҶҷе…ҘдјҳеҢ–: дҪҝз”Ё asyncio.gather е№¶еҸ‘жү§иЎҢ"""
    await asyncio.gather(
        *(self._put(key, memory_obj) 
          for key, memory_obj in zip(keys, memory_objs))
    )

3.2 Redis Sentinel еҜ№жҺҘ

3.2.1 й«ҳеҸҜз”Ёжһ¶жһ„

class RedisSentinelConnector(RemoteConnector):
    def __init__(self, hosts_and_ports, username, password, loop, local_cpu_backend):
        # зҺҜеўғеҸҳйҮҸй…ҚзҪ®
        service_name = os.getenv("REDIS_SERVICE_NAME", "redismaster")
        timeout = float(os.getenv("REDIS_TIMEOUT", "1"))

        # еҲӣе»ә Sentinel иҝһжҺҘ
        self.sentinel = redis.Sentinel(
            hosts_and_ports, socket_timeout=timeout
        )

        # дё»д»ҺеҲҶзҰ»
        self.master = self.sentinel.master_for(
            service_name, username=username, password=password
        )
        self.slave = self.sentinel.slave_for(
            service_name, username=username, password=password
        )

иҜ»еҶҷеҲҶзҰ»:

  • еҶҷж“ҚдҪң: дҪҝз”Ё self.master
  • иҜ»ж“ҚдҪң: дҪҝз”Ё self.slave (иҙҹиҪҪеқҮиЎЎ)

3.4.1 Valkey vs Redis

Valkey жҳҜ Redis зҡ„ејҖжәҗеҲҶж”ҜпјҢLMCache дҪҝз”Ё AWS Glide е®ўжҲ·з«Ҝе®һзҺ°еҜ№жҺҘпјҡ

# lmcache/v1/storage_backend/connector/valkey_connector.py

from glide import (
    GlideClient,
    GlideClientConfiguration,
    GlideClusterClient,
    GlideClusterClientConfiguration,
    NodeAddress,
    ServerCredentials,
)

3.4.2 зӢ¬з«ӢжЁЎејҸ

class ValkeyConnector(RemoteConnector):
    def _init_connection(self):
        async def create_connection():
            # й…ҚзҪ®и®ӨиҜҒ
            credentials = None
            if self.username or self.password:
                credentials = ServerCredentials(self.username, self.password)

            # жһ„е»әй…ҚзҪ®
            config_kwargs = {
                "addresses": [NodeAddress(self.host, self.port)],
                "credentials": credentials,
            }
            if self.database_id is not None:
                config_kwargs["database_id"] = self.database_id

            config = GlideClientConfiguration(**config_kwargs)
            return await GlideClient.create(config)

        future = asyncio.run_coroutine_threadsafe(create_connection(), self.loop)
        return future.result(timeout=1.0)

3.4.3 жү№йҮҸж“ҚдҪң

async def _put(self, key, memory_obj):
    # еәҸеҲ—еҢ–
    kv_bytes = bytes(memory_obj.byte_array)
    metadata_bytes = RemoteMetadata(...).serialize()

    # дҪҝз”Ё Batch жү№йҮҸеҶҷе…Ҙ
    batch = Batch(False)
    batch.set(kv_key, kv_bytes)
    batch.set(metadata_key, metadata_bytes)

    await self.connection.exec(batch, raise_on_error=False)

3.4.4 йӣҶзҫӨжЁЎејҸ

class ValkeyClusterConnector(RemoteConnector):
    def _get_keys_with_hash_tag(self, key):
        """дҪҝз”Ё Hash Tag зЎ®дҝқзӣёе…ій”®еңЁеҗҢдёҖеҲҶзүҮ"""
        key_str = key.to_string()
        metadata_key = f"{{{key_str}}}:metadata"  # {key} жҳҜ Hash Tag
        kv_key = f"{{{key_str}}}:kv_bytes"
        return metadata_key, kv_key

class MooncakestoreConnector(RemoteConnector):

4.3 йӣ¶жӢ·иҙқдјҳеҢ–

4.3.1 CPU зј“еҶІеҢәжіЁеҶҢ

еҺҹзҗҶ: RDMA йңҖиҰҒе°ҶеҶ…еӯҳеҢәеҹҹжіЁеҶҢ (Memory Registration) еҗҺжүҚиғҪзӣҙжҺҘи®ҝй—®пјҢйҒҝе…Қ CPU жӢ·иҙқгҖӮ

def _register_cpu_buffer(self):
    """
    жіЁеҶҢ CPU зј“еҶІеҢәд»Ҙж”ҜжҢҒйӣ¶жӢ·иҙқдј иҫ“

    жөҒзЁӢ:
    1. д»Һ PinAllocator иҺ·еҸ–й’үдҪҸзҡ„ CPU еҶ…еӯҳ
    2. иҺ·еҸ–зј“еҶІеҢәжҢҮй’Ҳе’ҢеӨ§е°Ҹ
    3. еҗ‘ Mooncake жіЁеҶҢиҜҘеҶ…еӯҳеҢәеҹҹ
    4. дҝқеӯҳжіЁеҶҢжҢҮй’ҲдҫӣеҗҺз»ӯдҪҝз”Ё
    """
    allocator = self.local_cpu_backend.memory_allocator

    # жЈҖжҹҘжҳҜеҗҰдҪҝз”Ё PinAllocator (й’үдҪҸеҶ…еӯҳеҲҶй…ҚеҷЁ)
    if hasattr(allocator, "pin_allocator"):
        buffer = allocator.pin_allocator.buffer
        self.registered_buffer_ptr = buffer.data_ptr()
        buffer_size = buffer.numel()

        logger.info(f"Registering CPU buffer for zero-copy:")
        logger.info(f"  Buffer ptr: {hex(self.registered_buffer_ptr)}")
        logger.info(f"  Buffer size: {buffer_size} bytes")

        # еҗ‘ Mooncake жіЁеҶҢзј“еҶІеҢә
        result = self.store.register_buffer(
            self.registered_buffer_ptr, 
            buffer_size
        )

        if result == 0:
            logger.info("CPU buffer registered successfully")
            self.zero_copy_enabled = True
        else:
            logger.warning(f"Failed to register buffer, error code: {result}")
            logger.warning("Zero-copy will be disabled")
            self.zero_copy_enabled = False
    else:
        logger.warning("PinAllocator not found, zero-copy disabled")
        logger.warning("Consider using 'PinCPUMemoryAllocator' for better performance")
        self.zero_copy_enabled = False

е…ій”®зӮ№:

  1. Pinned Memory: еҝ…йЎ»дҪҝз”Ёй’үдҪҸеҶ…еӯҳ (page-locked memory)
  2. дёҖж¬ЎжіЁеҶҢ: еңЁеҲқе§ӢеҢ–ж—¶жіЁеҶҢпјҢеҗҺз»ӯдј иҫ“зӣҙжҺҘдҪҝз”Ё
  3. й”ҷиҜҜеӨ„зҗҶ: жіЁеҶҢеӨұиҙҘж—¶йҷҚзә§дёәеёёи§„жӢ·иҙқжЁЎејҸ

4.3.2 жү№йҮҸйӣ¶жӢ·иҙқиҜ»еҸ–

дҪҝз”ЁеңәжҷҜ: save_chunk_meta=False жЁЎејҸ

async def _batch_get_into(self, keys):
    """
    дҪҝз”Ё batch_get_into е®һзҺ°йӣ¶жӢ·иҙқжү№йҮҸиҜ»еҸ–

    жөҒзЁӢ:
    1. йў„еҲҶй…ҚеҶ…еӯҳзј“еҶІеҢә (д»Һжң¬ең° CPU backend)
    2. иҺ·еҸ–жҜҸдёӘ buffer зҡ„жҢҮй’Ҳе’ҢеӨ§е°Ҹ
    3. и°ғз”Ё batch_get_into зӣҙжҺҘиҜ»еҸ–еҲ° buffer
    4. еӨ„зҗҶйғЁеҲҶиҜ»еҸ–зҡ„жғ…еҶө (reshape)

    жҖ§иғҪдјҳеҠҝ:
    - йӣ¶жӢ·иҙқ: RDMA зӣҙжҺҘеҶҷе…Ҙзӣ®ж Үзј“еҶІеҢә
    - жү№йҮҸдј иҫ“: дёҖж¬Ў RPC иҜ»еҸ–еӨҡдёӘ key
    - е№¶иЎҢ IO: Mooncake еҶ…йғЁе№¶иЎҢеӨ„зҗҶ
    """
    # 1. йў„еҲҶй…ҚеҶ…еӯҳзј“еҶІеҢә
    memory_objs = []
    key_strs = []
    buffer_ptrs = []
    buffer_sizes = []

    for key in keys:
        # дҪҝз”Ёйў„е…Ҳй…ҚзҪ®зҡ„ shape/dtype/fmt
        buf = self.local_cpu_backend.allocate(
            self.meta_shape,    # д»Һ lmcache_config еҠ иҪҪ
            self.meta_dtype,    # torch.float16/bfloat16
            self.meta_fmt       # torch.contiguous_format
        )

        if buf and buf.tensor:
            memory_objs.append(buf)
            key_strs.append(key.to_string())

            # иҺ·еҸ–зј“еҶІеҢәжҢҮй’Ҳе’ҢеӨ§е°Ҹ
            buffer_ptrs.append(buf.tensor.data_ptr())
            buffer_sizes.append(
                buf.tensor.numel() * buf.tensor.element_size()
            )
        else:
            memory_objs.append(None)

    # 2. и°ғз”Ё Mooncake batch_get_into (йӣ¶жӢ·иҙқ)
    logger.debug(f"Batch get {len(key_strs)} keys with zero-copy")

    bytes_read_list = await asyncio.to_thread(
        self.store.batch_get_into,
        key_strs,          # List[str]: й”®еҲ—иЎЁ
        buffer_ptrs,       # List[int]: зј“еҶІеҢәжҢҮй’Ҳ
        buffer_sizes       # List[int]: зј“еҶІеҢәеӨ§е°Ҹ
    )

    # 3. еӨ„зҗҶз»“жһң
    results = []
    for i, n_read in enumerate(bytes_read_list):
        if n_read > 0:
            # жҲҗеҠҹиҜ»еҸ–
            if n_read < buffer_sizes[i]:
                # йғЁеҲҶиҜ»еҸ–: йңҖиҰҒ reshape
                results.append(
                    self.reshape_partial_chunk(memory_objs[i], n_read)
                )
            else:
                # е®Ңж•ҙиҜ»еҸ–
                results.append(memory_objs[i])
        elif n_read == 0:
            # key дёҚеӯҳеңЁ
            results.append(None)
        else:
            # иҜ»еҸ–й”ҷиҜҜ
            logger.error(f"Failed to read key {key_strs[i]}: error code {n_read}")
            results.append(None)

    return results

жҖ§иғҪж•°жҚ®:

  • еёёи§„жӢ·иҙқ: ~500 MB/s (еҸ— CPU йҷҗеҲ¶)
  • йӣ¶жӢ·иҙқ (TCP): ~5 GB/s
  • йӣ¶жӢ·иҙқ (RDMA): ~25 GB/s (InfiniBand EDR)
  • йӣ¶жӢ·иҙқ (GPUDirect RDMA): ~50 GB/s (GPU-to-GPU)

4.3.3 йӣ¶жӢ·иҙқеҶҷе…Ҙ

дҪҝз”ЁеңәжҷҜ: save_chunk_meta=False жЁЎејҸ

async def _put_without_metadata(self, key_str, memory_obj):
    """
    йӣ¶жӢ·иҙқеҶҷе…ҘпјҢзӣҙжҺҘд»Һ tensor жҢҮй’Ҳдј иҫ“

    жөҒзЁӢ:
    1. иҺ·еҸ– tensor жҢҮй’Ҳе’ҢеӨ§е°Ҹ
    2. и°ғз”Ё put_from зӣҙжҺҘд»ҺжҢҮй’ҲиҜ»еҸ–
    3. зӯүеҫ…дј иҫ“е®ҢжҲҗ (еёҰи¶…ж—¶)

    еүҜжң¬й…ҚзҪ®:
    - replica_num: еүҜжң¬ж•°йҮҸ
    - preferred_segment: дјҳе…ҲеҲҶй…Қзҡ„иҠӮзӮ№
    """
    tensor = memory_obj.tensor
    buffer_ptr = tensor.data_ptr()
    buffer_size = tensor.numel() * tensor.element_size()

    logger.debug(f"Put key '{key_str}' with zero-copy:")
    logger.debug(f"  Buffer ptr: {hex(buffer_ptr)}")
    logger.debug(f"  Buffer size: {buffer_size} bytes")
    logger.debug(f"  Replicas: {self.replica_config.replica_num}")

    # и°ғз”Ё Mooncake put_from

        asyncio.to_thread(
            self.store.put_from,
            key_str,                    # key

            buffer_size,                # ж•°жҚ®еӨ§е°Ҹ
            self.replica_config         # еүҜжң¬й…ҚзҪ®
        ),
        timeout=self.config.transfer_timeout  # й»ҳи®Ө 5з§’
    )

4.3.4 GPU Direct RDMA ж”ҜжҢҒ

еҺҹзҗҶ: GPU еҶ…еӯҳзӣҙжҺҘйҖҡиҝҮ RDMA дј иҫ“пјҢж— йңҖз»ҸиҝҮ CPUгҖӮ

async def _batch_get_gpu_direct(self, keys, device_id=0):
    """
    GPU Direct RDMA иҜ»еҸ– (е®һйӘҢжҖ§еҠҹиғҪ)

    иҰҒжұӮ:
    1. NVIDIA GPU with GPUDirect RDMA support
    2. CUDA-aware MPI or UCX
    3. Mooncake compiled with GPU support
    4. RDMA NIC (InfiniBand or RoCE)

    жҖ§иғҪ:
    - ж¶ҲйҷӨ CPU-GPU PCIe з“¶йўҲ
    - зӣҙжҺҘ GPU-to-GPU дј иҫ“
    - е»¶иҝҹеҮҸе°‘ 50%+
    """
    import torch

    # 1. еңЁ GPU дёҠйў„еҲҶй…ҚеҶ…еӯҳ
    memory_objs = []
    buffer_ptrs = []
    buffer_sizes = []

    for key in keys:
        # еҲҶй…Қ GPU tensor
        tensor = torch.empty(
            self.meta_shape,
            dtype=self.meta_dtype,
            device=f'cuda:{device_id}'
        )

        memory_objs.append(tensor)
        buffer_ptrs.append(tensor.data_ptr())
        buffer_sizes.append(tensor.numel() * tensor.element_size())

    # 2. и°ғз”Ё Mooncake batch_get_into
    # Mooncake дјҡиҮӘеҠЁжЈҖжөӢ GPU жҢҮй’Ҳе№¶еҗҜз”Ё GPUDirect
    bytes_read_list = await asyncio.to_thread(
        self.store.batch_get_into,
        [k.to_string() for k in keys],
        buffer_ptrs,
        buffer_sizes
    )

    # 3. иҝ”еӣһ GPU tensors
    return [obj if n > 0 else None 
            for obj, n in zip(memory_objs, bytes_read_list)]

async def put(self, key, memory_obj):
    """ж №жҚ®е…ғж•°жҚ®еӯҳеӮЁзӯ–з•ҘйҖүжӢ©еҶҷе…Ҙж–№жі•"""
    if self.save_chunk_meta:

        await self._put_without_metadata(key.to_string(), memory_obj)

async def _put_without_metadata(self, key_str, memory_obj):
    """йӣ¶жӢ·иҙқеҶҷе…Ҙ"""
    tensor = memory_obj.tensor
    buffer_ptr = tensor.data_ptr()
    buffer_size = tensor.numel() * tensor.element_size()

    await asyncio.wait_for(
        asyncio.to_thread(
            self.store.put_from,
            key_str, buffer_ptr, buffer_size,
            self.replica_config  # еүҜжң¬й…ҚзҪ®
        ),
        timeout=self.config.transfer_timeout
    )

class InfinistoreConnector(RemoteConnector):
    def __init__(self, host, port, dev_name, link_type, loop, memory_allocator):
        # й…ҚзҪ® RDMA иҝһжҺҘ
        config = infinistore.ClientConfig(
            host_addr=host,
            service_port=port,
            log_level="info",
            connection_type=infinistore.TYPE_RDMA,
            ib_port=1,
            link_type=link_type,  # LINK_ETHERNET / LINK_INFINIBAND
            dev_name=dev_name,    # еҰӮ mlx5_0
        )

        self.rdma_conn = infinistore.InfinityConnection(config)
        self.rdma_conn.connect()

        # еҲқе§ӢеҢ–зј“еҶІеҢәжұ 
        self.buffer_size = 40 << 20  # 40MB
        self._init_buffer_pools()

5.3 зј“еҶІеҢәжұ з®ЎзҗҶ

def _init_buffer_pools(self):
    """
    еҲқе§ӢеҢ–еҸ‘йҖҒе’ҢжҺҘж”¶зј“еҶІеҢәжұ 
    жҜҸдёӘзј“еҶІеҢәжіЁеҶҢдёә RDMA Memory Region (MR)
    """
    MAX_BUFFER_CNT = 16

    self.send_buffers = []
    self.recv_buffers = []
    self.send_queue = asyncio.Queue(maxsize=MAX_BUFFER_CNT)
    self.recv_queue = asyncio.Queue(maxsize=MAX_BUFFER_CNT)

    for i in range(MAX_BUFFER_CNT):
        # еҸ‘йҖҒзј“еҶІеҢә
        send_buffer = bytearray(self.buffer_size)
        self.rdma_conn.register_mr(_get_ptr(send_buffer), self.buffer_size)
        self.send_buffers.append(send_buffer)
        self.send_queue.put_nowait(i)

        # жҺҘж”¶зј“еҶІеҢә
        recv_buffer = bytearray(self.buffer_size)
        self.rdma_conn.register_mr(_get_ptr(recv_buffer), self.buffer_size)
        self.recv_buffers.append(recv_buffer)
        self.recv_queue.put_nowait(i)

class NixlStorageAgent:
    def __init__(self, allocator, pool, device, backend, backend_params):
        # еҲӣе»ә NIXL Agent
        self.agent_name = "NixlAgent_" + str(uuid.uuid4())
        nixl_conf = NixlAgentConfig(backends=[])
        self.nixl_agent = NixlAgent(self.agent_name, nixl_conf)

        # еҲӣе»әеҗҺз«Ҝ
        self.nixl_agent.create_backend(backend, backend_params)

6.3 NixlChannel (P2P дј иҫ“йҖҡйҒ“)

6.3.1 UCX еҗҺз«Ҝй…ҚзҪ®

UCX (Unified Communication X) жҳҜз»ҹдёҖйҖҡдҝЎжЎҶжһ¶пјҢж”ҜжҢҒеӨҡз§Қдј иҫ“еҚҸи®®пјҡ

class NixlChannel(BaseTransferChannel):
    def __init__(self, async_mode=False, **kwargs):
        """
        еҲқе§ӢеҢ– NIXL Channel з”ЁдәҺ P2P йҖҡдҝЎ

        еҸӮж•°:
        - buffer_ptr: зј“еҶІеҢәжҢҮй’Ҳ
        - buffer_size: зј“еҶІеҢәеӨ§е°Ҹ
        - align_bytes: еҜ№йҪҗеӯ—иҠӮ (page_size)
        - tp_rank: еҪ“еүҚиҠӮзӮ№зҡ„ rank ID
        - backends: еҗҺз«ҜеҲ—иЎЁ (й»ҳи®Ө ["UCX"])
        - backend_params: UCX еҗҺз«ҜеҸӮж•°
        """
        # й»ҳи®ӨдҪҝз”Ё UCX еҗҺз«Ҝ
        backends = kwargs.get("backends", ["UCX"])
        backend_params = kwargs.get("backend_params", {})

        # UCX й»ҳи®ӨеҸӮж•°
        default_ucx_params = {
            "tcp_port": 12345,           # UCX TCP з«ҜеҸЈ
            "enable_rdma": True,          # еҗҜз”Ё RDMA
            "enable_tcp": True,           # еҗҜз”Ё TCP еӣһйҖҖ
            "max_eager_size": 8192,       # е°Ҹж¶ҲжҒҜйҳҲеҖј (eager protocol)
            "rndv_thresh": 8192,          # еӨ§ж¶ҲжҒҜйҳҲеҖј (rendezvous protocol)
            "log_level": "error",         # UCX ж—Ҙеҝ—зә§еҲ«
        }
        default_ucx_params.update(backend_params.get("UCX", {}))

        # еҲӣе»ә NIXL Agent Wrapper
        self.nixl_wrapper = NixlAgentWrapper(
            buffer_ptr=kwargs["buffer_ptr"],
            buffer_size=kwargs["buffer_size"],
            page_size=kwargs["align_bytes"],
            tp_rank=kwargs["tp_rank"],
            backends=backends,
            backend_params={"UCX": default_ucx_params}
        )

        self.nixl_agent = self.nixl_wrapper.nixl_agent

        # жң¬ең°дј иҫ“еҸҘжҹ„ (з”ЁдәҺ P2P йҖҡдҝЎ)
        self.xfer_handler = self.nixl_wrapper.xfer_handler

        # иҝңзЁӢдј иҫ“еҸҘжҹ„еӯ—е…ё (receiver_id -> handler)
        self.remote_xfer_handlers_dict = {}

6.3.2 еҶ…еӯҳжіЁеҶҢдёҺдј иҫ“жҸҸиҝ°з¬Ұ

class NixlAgentWrapper:
    def __init__(self, buffer_ptr, buffer_size, page_size, tp_rank, backends, backend_params):
        """
        е°ҒиЈ… NIXL Agent е№¶з®ЎзҗҶеҶ…еӯҳжіЁеҶҢ
        """
        # 1. еҲӣе»ә NIXL Agent
        agent_name = f"NixlAgent_rank{tp_rank}_{uuid.uuid4()}"
        nixl_conf = NixlAgentConfig(backends=[])
        self.nixl_agent = NixlAgent(agent_name, nixl_conf)

        # 2. еҲӣе»ә UCX еҗҺз«Ҝ
        for backend in backends:
            params = backend_params.get(backend, {})
            self.nixl_agent.create_backend(backend, params)
            logger.info(f"Created NIXL backend: {backend}")
            logger.info(f"  Params: {params}")

        # 3. жіЁеҶҢеҶ…еӯҳеҢәеҹҹ
        self.buffer_ptr = buffer_ptr
        self.buffer_size = buffer_size
        self.page_size = page_size

        # еҶ…еӯҳжіЁеҶҢеҲ—иЎЁ: [(ptr, size, device_id, "")]
        reg_list = [(buffer_ptr, buffer_size, 0, "")]

        # иҮӘеҠЁжЈҖжөӢеҶ…еӯҳзұ»еһӢ (VRAM/DRAM)
        mem_type = self._detect_memory_type(buffer_ptr)

        logger.info(f"Registering memory for RDMA:")
        logger.info(f"  Buffer ptr: {hex(buffer_ptr)}")
        logger.info(f"  Buffer size: {buffer_size} bytes")
        logger.info(f"  Memory type: {mem_type}")
        logger.info(f"  Page size: {page_size}")

        # жіЁеҶҢеҶ…еӯҳпјҢиҝ”еӣһжіЁеҶҢжҸҸиҝ°з¬Ұ
        reg_descs = self.nixl_agent.register_memory(reg_list, mem_type=mem_type)

        if not reg_descs or len(reg_descs) == 0:
            raise RuntimeError("Failed to register memory with NIXL")

        self.reg_desc = reg_descs[0]  # жіЁеҶҢжҸҸиҝ°з¬Ұ

        # 4. еҮҶеӨҮдј иҫ“еҸҘжҹ„ (з”ЁдәҺ P2P йҖҡдҝЎ)
        num_pages = (buffer_size + page_size - 1) // page_size

        # еҲӣе»әдј иҫ“жҸҸиҝ°з¬ҰеҲ—иЎЁ
        xfer_descs = []
        for i in range(num_pages):
            offset = i * page_size
            size = min(page_size, buffer_size - offset)
            xfer_descs.append((self.reg_desc, offset, size))

        # еҮҶеӨҮдј иҫ“еҸҘжҹ„ (READ е’Ң WRITE еқҮеҸҜдҪҝз”Ё)
        self.xfer_handler = self.nixl_agent.prep_xfer_dlist(
            "READ",      # ж“ҚдҪңзұ»еһӢ (READ/WRITE е…ұдә«еҗҢдёҖеҸҘжҹ„)
            xfer_descs,  # жң¬ең°дј иҫ“жҸҸиҝ°з¬Ұ
            []           # иҝңзЁӢжҸҸиҝ°з¬Ұ (з©ә)
        )

        logger.info(f"Prepared transfer handler with {num_pages} pages")

    def _detect_memory_type(self, ptr):
        """жЈҖжөӢеҶ…еӯҳзұ»еһӢ (VRAM жҲ– DRAM)"""
        try:
            import torch
            # е°қиҜ•жЈҖжөӢжҳҜеҗҰдёә CUDA еҶ…еӯҳ
            for device in range(torch.cuda.device_count()):
                if torch.cuda.memory_allocated(device) > 0:
                    # з®ҖеҚ•еҗҜеҸ‘ејҸжЈҖжөӢ
                    return "VRAM"
        except:
            pass
        return "DRAM"  # й»ҳи®Ө CPU еҶ…еӯҳ

жіЁеҶҢжҸҸиҝ°з¬Ұз»“жһ„:

Registration Descriptor:
  - reg_id: жіЁеҶҢ ID
  - base_addr: еҹәең°еқҖ
  - length: еҶ…еӯҳй•ҝеәҰ
  - mem_type: VRAM/DRAM
  - rkey: Remote Key (RDMA дҪҝз”Ё)
  - lkey: Local Key (RDMA дҪҝз”Ё)

Transfer Descriptor:
  - reg_desc: жіЁеҶҢжҸҸиҝ°з¬Ұ
  - offset: зӣёеҜ№еҒҸз§»йҮҸ
  - size: дј иҫ“еӨ§е°Ҹ

6.3.3 P2P жҸЎжүӢеҚҸи®®

3 жӯҘжҸЎжүӢжөҒзЁӢ:

жӯҘйӘӨ 1: е…ғж•°жҚ®дәӨжҚў (Metadata Exchange)
  Sender                           Receiver
    |                                  |
    |  {"rank": 0, "buffer_size": X}  |
    |--------------------------------->|
    |                                  |
    |  {"rank": 1, "buffer_size": Y}  |
    |<---------------------------------|
    |                                  |

жӯҘйӘӨ 2: дј иҫ“жҸҸиҝ°з¬ҰдәӨжҚў (Transfer Descriptor Exchange)
  Sender                           Receiver
    |                                  |
    |   xfer_handler (serialized)      |
    |--------------------------------->|
    |                                  |
    |   xfer_handler (serialized)      |
    |<---------------------------------|
    |                                  |

жӯҘйӘӨ 3: еҮҶеӨҮе°ұз»Ә (Ready Confirmation)
  Sender                           Receiver
    |                                  |
    |         "READY"                  |
    |--------------------------------->|
    |                                  |
    |         "READY"                  |
    |<---------------------------------|
    |                                  |
    [Both sides ready for P2P transfer]

е®һзҺ°д»Јз Ғ:

async def perform_handshake(self, peer_rank, comm_group):
    """
    жү§иЎҢ P2P жҸЎжүӢпјҢдәӨжҚўдј иҫ“жҸҸиҝ°з¬Ұ

    еҸӮж•°:
    - peer_rank: еҜ№з«ҜиҠӮзӮ№ rank
    - comm_group: йҖҡдҝЎз»„ (torch.distributed group)
    """
    import torch.distributed as dist

    # жӯҘйӘӨ 1: дәӨжҚўе…ғж•°жҚ®
    local_meta = {
        "rank": self.nixl_wrapper.tp_rank,
        "buffer_size": self.nixl_wrapper.buffer_size,
        "page_size": self.nixl_wrapper.page_size,
    }

    # дҪҝз”Ё torch.distributed дәӨжҚў
    meta_list = [None] * dist.get_world_size(comm_group)
    dist.all_gather_object(meta_list, local_meta, group=comm_group)

    peer_meta = meta_list[peer_rank]
    logger.info(f"Received metadata from rank {peer_rank}: {peer_meta}")

    # жӯҘйӘӨ 2: дәӨжҚўдј иҫ“жҸҸиҝ°з¬Ұ
    # еәҸеҲ—еҢ–жң¬ең°дј иҫ“еҸҘжҹ„
    local_handler_bytes = self.nixl_agent.serialize_handler(
        self.nixl_wrapper.xfer_handler
    )

    # дәӨжҚўеәҸеҲ—еҢ–еҗҺзҡ„еҸҘжҹ„
    handler_list = [None] * dist.get_world_size(comm_group)
    dist.all_gather_object(handler_list, local_handler_bytes, group=comm_group)

    # еҸҚеәҸеҲ—еҢ–еҜ№з«ҜеҸҘжҹ„
    peer_handler_bytes = handler_list[peer_rank]
    peer_handler = self.nixl_agent.deserialize_handler(peer_handler_bytes)

    # дҝқеӯҳиҝңзЁӢдј иҫ“еҸҘжҹ„
    self.remote_xfer_handlers_dict[peer_rank] = peer_handler

    logger.info(f"Handshake complete with rank {peer_rank}")
    logger.info(f"  Local buffer: {hex(self.nixl_wrapper.buffer_ptr)}")
    logger.info(f"  Remote handler ID: {id(peer_handler)}")

    # жӯҘйӘӨ 3: еҗҢжӯҘеұҸйҡң
    dist.barrier(group=comm_group)

    return peer_handler

6.3.4 RDMA еҶҷе…Ҙж“ҚдҪң

async def async_batched_write(self, objects, transfer_spec):
    """
    RDMA еҶҷе…Ҙж“ҚдҪңпјҢе°Ҷжң¬ең°ж•°жҚ®дј иҫ“еҲ°иҝңзЁӢиҠӮзӮ№

    еҸӮж•°:
    - objects: иҰҒдј иҫ“зҡ„еҶ…еӯҳеҜ№иұЎеҲ—иЎЁ
    - transfer_spec: дј иҫ“и§„ж ј
        {
            "receiver_id": int,           # жҺҘж”¶иҖ… rank
            "remote_indexes": List[int],  # иҝңзЁӢзҙўеј•еҲ—иЎЁ
        }

    жөҒзЁӢ:
    1. иҺ·еҸ–жң¬ең°еҶ…еӯҳзҙўеј•
    2. еҲӣе»ә RDMA WRITE дј иҫ“еҸҘжҹ„
    3. еҗҜеҠЁејӮжӯҘдј иҫ“
    4. иҪ®иҜўдј иҫ“зҠ¶жҖҒзӣҙеҲ°е®ҢжҲҗ
    """
    # 1. иҺ·еҸ–жң¬ең°еҶ…еӯҳзҙўеј•
    local_indices = self.get_local_mem_indices(objects)

    receiver_id = transfer_spec["receiver_id"]
    remote_indices = transfer_spec["remote_indexes"]

    logger.debug(f"RDMA Write to rank {receiver_id}:")
    logger.debug(f"  Local indices: {local_indices}")
    logger.debug(f"  Remote indices: {remote_indices}")
    logger.debug(f"  Num objects: {len(objects)}")

    # 2. еҲӣе»ә RDMA дј иҫ“еҸҘжҹ„
    # дҪҝз”Ёйў„еҮҶеӨҮзҡ„дј иҫ“еҸҘжҹ„
    handle = self.nixl_agent.make_prepped_xfer(
        "WRITE",                                          # RDMA WRITE ж“ҚдҪң
        self.nixl_wrapper.xfer_handler,                   # жң¬ең°дј иҫ“еҸҘжҹ„
        local_indices,                                    # жң¬ең°еҶ…еӯҳзҙўеј•
        self.remote_xfer_handlers_dict[receiver_id],      # иҝңзЁӢдј иҫ“еҸҘжҹ„
        remote_indices,                                   # иҝңзЁӢеҶ…еӯҳзҙўеј•
    )

    # 3. ејҖе§Ӣдј иҫ“ (ејӮжӯҘ)
    self.nixl_agent.transfer(handle)

    # 4. иҪ®иҜўдј иҫ“зҠ¶жҖҒ
    poll_interval = 0.001  # 1ms
    timeout = 30.0         # 30з§’и¶…ж—¶
    elapsed = 0.0

    while True:
        status = self.nixl_agent.check_xfer_state(handle)

        if status == "DONE":
            logger.debug(f"RDMA Write completed successfully")
            break
        elif status == "ERR":
            error_msg = self.nixl_agent.get_xfer_error(handle)
            raise RuntimeError(f"RDMA write failed: {error_msg}")
        elif status == "PENDING":
            # з»§з»ӯзӯүеҫ…
            await asyncio.sleep(poll_interval)
            elapsed += poll_interval

            if elapsed > timeout:
                raise TimeoutError(
                    f"RDMA write timeout after {timeout}s to rank {receiver_id}"
                )
        else:
            raise RuntimeError(f"Unknown transfer status: {status}")

    return len(objects)

def get_local_mem_indices(self, objects):
    """
    иҺ·еҸ–еҶ…еӯҳеҜ№иұЎеңЁзј“еҶІеҢәдёӯзҡ„зҙўеј•

    иҝ”еӣһ: List[int] - йЎөйқўзҙўеј•еҲ—иЎЁ
    """
    indices = []
    page_size = self.nixl_wrapper.page_size

    for obj in objects:
        # и®Ўз®—еҜ№иұЎеңЁзј“еҶІеҢәдёӯзҡ„еҒҸз§»
        offset = obj.tensor.data_ptr() - self.nixl_wrapper.buffer_ptr

        # и®Ўз®—йЎөйқўзҙўеј•
        page_index = offset // page_size

        # жЈҖжҹҘжҳҜеҗҰи·ЁйЎө
        obj_size = obj.tensor.numel() * obj.tensor.element_size()
        num_pages = (obj_size + page_size - 1) // page_size

        for i in range(num_pages):
            indices.append(page_index + i)

    return indices

6.3.5 RDMA иҜ»еҸ–ж“ҚдҪң

async def async_batched_read(self, objects, transfer_spec):
    """
    RDMA иҜ»еҸ–ж“ҚдҪңпјҢд»ҺиҝңзЁӢиҠӮзӮ№жӢүеҸ–ж•°жҚ®

    дёҺ WRITE зұ»дјјпјҢдҪҶж“ҚдҪңж–№еҗ‘зӣёеҸҚ
    """
    local_indices = self.get_local_mem_indices(objects)

    sender_id = transfer_spec["sender_id"]
    remote_indices = transfer_spec["remote_indexes"]

    logger.debug(f"RDMA Read from rank {sender_id}:")
    logger.debug(f"  Local indices: {local_indices}")
    logger.debug(f"  Remote indices: {remote_indices}")

    # еҲӣе»ә RDMA READ дј иҫ“еҸҘжҹ„
    handle = self.nixl_agent.make_prepped_xfer(
        "READ",                                         # RDMA READ ж“ҚдҪң
        self.nixl_wrapper.xfer_handler,                 # жң¬ең°дј иҫ“еҸҘжҹ„
        local_indices,                                  # жң¬ең°еҶ…еӯҳзҙўеј•
        self.remote_xfer_handlers_dict[sender_id],      # иҝңзЁӢдј иҫ“еҸҘжҹ„
        remote_indices,                                 # иҝңзЁӢеҶ…еӯҳзҙўеј•
    )

    # жү§иЎҢдј иҫ“е№¶зӯүеҫ…е®ҢжҲҗ
    self.nixl_agent.transfer(handle)

    # зӯүеҫ…дј иҫ“е®ҢжҲҗ (еёҰи¶…ж—¶)
    success = self.nixl_agent.wait_xfer(handle, timeout=30.0)

    if not success:
        raise RuntimeError(f"RDMA read failed from rank {sender_id}")

    logger.debug(f"RDMA Read completed successfully")
    return len(objects)

7.6.4 е®Ңж•ҙзӨәдҫӢпјҡеӨҡиҠӮзӮ№ P2P й…ҚзҪ®

# lmcache_nixl_p2p_config.py

import torch
import torch.distributed as dist
from lmcache.v1.config import LMCacheEngineConfig
from lmcache.v1.transfer_channel.nixl_channel import NixlChannel

# 1. еҲқе§ӢеҢ–еҲҶеёғејҸзҺҜеўғ
dist.init_process_group(
    backend="nccl",
    init_method="tcp://master:23456",
    world_size=4,
    rank=int(os.environ["RANK"])
)

# 2. й…ҚзҪ® LMCache
config = LMCacheEngineConfig()
config.chunk_size = 256
config.local_device = "cuda"

# 3. еҲҶй…Қ GPU зј“еҶІеҢә
buffer_size = 4 * (1024 ** 3)  # 4GB
buffer = torch.empty(
    buffer_size // 2,  # float16 еҚ  2 еӯ—иҠӮ
    dtype=torch.float16,
    device="cuda"
)

# 4. еҲӣе»ә NIXL Channel
channel = NixlChannel(
    async_mode=True,
    buffer_ptr=buffer.data_ptr(),
    buffer_size=buffer_size,
    align_bytes=256 * 1024,  # 256KB йЎөеӨ§е°Ҹ
    tp_rank=dist.get_rank(),
    backends=["UCX"],
    backend_params={
        "UCX": {
            "tcp_port": 12345 + dist.get_rank(),  # жҜҸдёӘ rank дёҚеҗҢз«ҜеҸЈ
            "enable_rdma": True,
            "device_name": "mlx5_0",
            "enable_gpu_direct": True,
            "log_level": "info",
        }
    }
)

# 5. жү§иЎҢ P2P жҸЎжүӢ
for peer_rank in range(dist.get_world_size()):
    if peer_rank != dist.get_rank():
        await channel.perform_handshake(peer_rank, dist.group.WORLD)

print(f"Rank {dist.get_rank()}: P2P handshake completed with all peers")

# 6. дҪҝз”ЁзӨәдҫӢ: еҸ‘йҖҒж•°жҚ®еҲ° rank 1
if dist.get_rank() == 0:
    # еҮҶеӨҮж•°жҚ®
    data = torch.randn(1024, 1024, dtype=torch.float16, device="cuda")

    # RDMA еҶҷе…Ҙ
    await channel.async_batched_write(
        objects=[data],
        transfer_spec={
            "receiver_id": 1,
            "remote_indexes": [0],  # иҝңзЁӢзј“еҶІеҢәзҙўеј•
        }
    )
    print("Data sent successfully")

# жё…зҗҶ
dist.destroy_process_group()

8. жңҖдҪіе®һи·ө

8.1 йҖүжӢ©еҗҲйҖӮзҡ„еҗҺз«Ҝ

еңәжҷҜжҺЁиҚҗеҗҺз«ҜеҺҹеӣ 
еӨҡе®һдҫӢе…ұдә«зј“еӯҳRedis Cluster / Valkey ClusterиҮӘеҠЁеҲҶзүҮгҖҒй«ҳеҸҜз”Ё
дҪҺе»¶иҝҹжң¬ең°зј“еӯҳRedis Standaloneз®ҖеҚ•й«ҳж•Ҳ
GPU иҠӮзӮ№еҲҶеёғејҸзј“еӯҳMooncakeStore (RDMA)GPU Direct RDMA йӣ¶жӢ·иҙқ
и¶…й«ҳйҖҹзҪ‘з»ңзҺҜеўғInfiniStoreеҺҹз”ҹ RDMA дјҳеҢ–
P2P иҠӮзӮ№дј иҫ“NIXL + UCXиҮӘйҖӮеә”дј иҫ“еҚҸи®®
жҢҒд№…еҢ–еӯҳеӮЁNIXL + GDS/POSIXзӣҙжҺҘеӯҳеӮЁеҲ° NVMe/SSD

8.2 жҖ§иғҪдјҳеҢ–е»әи®®

8.2.1 Redis/Valkey дјҳеҢ–

  1. иҝһжҺҘжұ еӨ§е°Ҹ: ж №жҚ®е№¶еҸ‘йңҖжұӮи°ғж•ҙ max_connections = 150
  2. жү№йҮҸж“ҚдҪң: дҪҝз”Ё batched_put еҮҸе°‘зҪ‘з»ңеҫҖиҝ”
  3. е…ғж•°жҚ®еӯҳеӮЁ: еӨ§ chunk иҖғиҷ‘ save_chunk_meta=false
  4. еҶ…еӯҳзӯ–з•Ҙ: й…ҚзҪ® Redis maxmemory-policy=allkeys-lru

8.2.2 MooncakeStore дјҳеҢ–

  1. йӣ¶жӢ·иҙқжЁЎејҸ: save_chunk_meta: false
  2. жң¬ең°еҲҶй…Қдјҳе…Ҳ: prefer_local_alloc: true
  3. еҚҸи®®йҖүжӢ©: й«ҳйҖҹзҪ‘з»ңз”Ё protocol: rdma
  4. зј“еҶІеҢәеӨ§е°Ҹ: ж №жҚ®еҶ…еӯҳи°ғж•ҙ local_buffer_size

8.2.3 NIXL дјҳеҢ–

  1. йЎөеӨ§е°Ҹ: еӨ§ chunk з”Ё 2MBпјҢе°Ҹ chunk з”Ё 256KB
  2. еҗҺз«ҜйҖүжӢ©: CUDA GPU з”Ё GDS_MTпјҢCPU з”Ё POSIX
